title: Docusaurus Documentation Tabs Restructure Proposal

analysis.title: Docusaurus Documentation Tabs Restructure Proposal
analysis.description: Screenshot of a technical proposal to restructure Docusaurus 3.x documentation by replacing list-based OS-specific content with a tabbed interface for improved user experience.
